subject: Excited to connect at the conference, What It Takes To Make Automation Work In IT Ops

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at your team. Would love to swap notes on Ai, Gtm, Revops, Saas, Sales, Marketing, Pipeline, Hubspot.
